title: Cross-Vendor Caching Comparison
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: Token Optimization for Generative AI
description: Multi-line cumulative cost chart comparing Anthropic, OpenAI, and Gemini caching mechanics across 50 requests for the same workload.

learningObjectives: Compare the caching cost models of three vendors
Recommend a vendor for a workload based on prefix length, request volume, and cache lifetime

pedagogical.teachingStrategy: Multi-line cumulative cost chart with parameterized workload
keyQuestions: Which vendor wins for a 1K-token prefix at 1 req/min for 1 hour?
Which vendor wins for a 50K-token prefix at 10 req/min for 24 hours?
commonMisconceptions: Assuming caching always pays off (storage cost on Gemini explicit can flip the comparison)
assessmentOpportunities: Pick the cheapest vendor for a described workload
